title: B.Sc (Hons. with Research) Computer Science (Cloud Computing)
content: *4-year Undergraduate Degree (Honours with Research) 4-year UG Degree with Honours (Source: - UGC Curriculum & Credit Framework for Undergraduate Programmes) XII with Science with minimum 50% marks. (Maths or Computer Application as a subject in XII) Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list For Migration from Other Universities: 2) XII with Science with minimum 50% marks.
